synopsis: Case found to be administratively out of order by Standing Judicial Commission.
notes: Case 2010-2 (Complaint of Dale Cutler vs. Platte Valley Presbytery) was listed in the docket on GA38 p. 131 and explicitly identified in the SJC report section as one of the cases 'found to be administratively out of order.' No decision text or findings were issued; this is an administrative disposition only.
